---
title: "Greek Letters"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    code_folding: hide
---

For Latex code right click on symbol, select Show Math As, then select TeX Commands. Make sure you have a dollar sign placed before and after the TeX Command when you copy it into an R Markdown file. 


**alpha**  
$\alpha$ *(lowercase)*

&nbsp;

**beta**  
$\beta$ *(lowercase)*

&nbsp;

**gamma**  
$\gamma$ *(lowercase)*  
$\Gamma$ *(capital)* 

&nbsp;

**delta**  
$\delta$ *(lowercase)*  
$\Delta$ *(capital)* 

&nbsp;

**epsilon**  
$\epsilon$ *(lowercase)*

&nbsp;

**theta**  
$\theta$ *(lowercase)*

&nbsp;

**lambda**  
$\lambda$ *(lowercase)*

&nbsp;

**mu**  
$\mu$ *(lowercase)*

&nbsp;

**pi**  
$\pi$ *(lowercase)*  
$\Pi$ *(capital)* 

&nbsp;

**sigma**  
$\sigma$ *(lowercase)*  
$\Sigma$ *(capital)* 

&nbsp;
